title: taraxacum xanthophyllum
intro: Taraxacum xanthophyllum, also known as the yellow dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is used in herbal preparations to support liver function, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Traditional herbal remedies often employ the plant's leaves and roots in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
